reasoning: The latest close price for PLD (on 2025-11-07) was 123.63, which represents a short-term pop compared to the previous few days where it hovered around 121-122. Because this closing price serves as our threshold, mean reversion for a short-term forecast (2025-11-16) places the probability of an increase slightly below 50% (estimated at 0.48). Stock movements over brief horizons are mostly noise. For further horizons (2025-12-09 and 2026-02-07), the upward long-term drift of the stock market pulls the expectation closer to and eventually up to 0.50. The linear model from yfinance also suggests a P(exceed) around 0.52 for a longer time frame but combining this with the immediate random walk from an elevated day's close yields estimates of 0.48, 0.49, and 0.50.
